nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 乌干达
nodes.summary: 乌干达是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联249种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Elgon francolin、Shelley's francolin等249种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛

nodes.name: Chestnut weaver
nodes.summary: Chestnut weaver（Chestnut weaver，学名 Ploceus rubiginosus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: They can typically be found in Kenya, Botswana, Ethiopia, Somalia, Uganda, Tanzania, Angola, and Namibia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It can be found in shrubland and thornveld, typically below 1,500 Meters. Colonies of Chestnut Weavers can be found near Nairobi and on the Laikipia Plateau in Kenya, but only when there is good rain, they will also appear further South in Kenya, in Tsavo, from October to April
